title: Index on expression leads to an incorrect LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a VARCHAR(255), b INTEGER, c FLOAT);
CREATE INDEX t3i ON t3(a, COALESCE(b, 0));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t3 ON (x=a) WHERE COALESCE(c, 0) > 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (b=y) WHERE COALESCE(z, 0) < 0;
key_bug_features: Index on expression causes incorrect LEFT JOIN results
